Metadata.homeDescription: ANMAR Agency is a media and performance ecosystem connecting brands with audiences through cinema, web3, sports, and in-app advertising.
Metadata.contactDescription: Get in touch with ANMAR Agency for premium advertising partnership opportunities.

Hero.title: RISE TO LEAD
Hero.text: ANMAR Agency is a media and performance ecosystem. We connect brands with relevant audiences through sophisticated formats, intelligent targeting, and creative production.

About.title: Mission
About.text: Our mission is to enable brands to rise to leadership with scale and control. "ANMAR" is like the flame of the phoenix, an energy of sustainable growth with measurable impact.

Mission.title: About us
Mission.text: Cinema • Web3/Fintech • Sports • Built-in applications • Web (adult/non-adult) — a unified system for attracting traffic and creativity, optimized for your KPIs.

Contact.title: Request for cooperation
Contact.text: Select the source of interest and provide your contact information. The ANMAR team will offer partnership terms and a media mix tailored to your KPIs.
Contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project, goals, and desired KPIs...
Contact.success: Your request has been sent successfully!
